alerts.text: Device crossed into At Risk: health 61
Device crossed into Critical: health 32
Predicted failure in ~10 days (Thermal / power / mechanical)

recommendation.priority: P1 - act now, high failure probability
recommendation.action: Inspect the mechanical assembly and reduce load — mechanical overstrain (wear×load) is the dominant failure signal. Resolving this root cause also relieves the co-occurring downstream stress.
recommendation.headline: Inspect the mechanical assembly and reduce load
recommendation.priorityReason: act now — high, near-term failure probability
recommendation.basis: rule-based; driven by dominant subsystem + top SHAP signal

cascade.summary: Mechanical overstrain (components risk 0.99) is co-occurring with rising storage risk (0.83). Worn rotating assemblies raise vibration, which is a recognized driver of read/write errors and head stress on nearby drives. (Also co-occurring: engine remaining-useful-life is also low.)
cascade.basis: authored domain-reasoning overlay (hand-written rules over co-occurring subsystem states; not learned, not model-discovered)
